text: Amazon is among the four Magnificent Seven technology companies scheduled to report quarterly earnings this week, alongside Microsoft, Meta, and Apple. Market attention is focused on this concentrated earnings period, with the four companies representing a combined $11.3 trillion in market capitalization. Analyst commentary indicates that AI-powered AWS growth and advertising revenue are expected to underpin an upbeat Q2 outlook for the company.
